ddls:
CREATE TABLE "capabilities" (
  "capability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each capability */,
  "capability_name" TEXT /* Name of the capability (e.g., online, busy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the capability does */,
  "syntax" TEXT /* Syntax for implementing the capability */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact person or group for inquiries about the capability */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference for the capability, often a standard or RFC */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform or service where this capability is applicable */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the capability is currently active or deprecated */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the capability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_presence" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "capability_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the capability the user has set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current presence status of the user (e.g., online, away) */,
  "notification_setting" TEXT /* Whether the user wants to receive notification copies ('yes' or 'no') */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the presence information was last updated */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform (e.g., email, chat) for which the presence status is set */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device used by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device for security and logging purposes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user for context-aware notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_presence_capability_id FOREIGN KEY ("capability_id") REFERENCES capabilities ("capability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for additional contact options */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., message, status update) */,
  "source_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_source_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the notification */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., viewed, dismissed) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device used to access the notification */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used to access the notification */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the device used to access the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the setting belongs */,
  "setting_key" TEXT /* Key of the setting (e.g., 'email_notifications') */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting (e.g., 'enabled', 'disabled') */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform (e.g., email, chat) for which the setting is applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
